calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-27-2021 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-03-2020 Advanced From Jan-11-21 To Sep-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-19-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randy Harris and Sarah Ward appeared by zoom for and with James Fleetwood by zoom.

The Court stated that it reviewed the materials, that the only issue is the extraordinary fees, that there has been enough support to award them, but it is required to make sure they are reasonable and that they are in the range of a reduction of $5,000.00. Ms. Ward stated that she feels their rates are reasonable, but she also understands that some of the work performed may have been work that is normally performed by an Administrator. Ms. Ward also stated that they had meetings with the Realtor to maximize efficiency, that they had discussions with the Administrator to explain what his responsibilities would be and that they are willing to accept the reduction of $5,000.00 in order to resolve this for their Client today. The Amended First and Final Report of Administrator on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition with a modest reduction as described.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
